docs.title: Coherent
docs.text: It shouldn't be that all roads lead to Beijing or to Washington. Latin America has to find a more stragetic way, it needs a conherent regional strategy.

docs.title: Made up of
docs.text: Our weather is made up of sun, air and water that are mixed up in all sorts of ways.

docs.title: Rustling
docs.text: Just then they heard the rustling sound of someone else coming up.

docs.title: Snuggle
docs.text: I snuggled down in my sleeping bag.

docs.title: Sobering
docs.text: His death is a sobering reminder of the dangers of mountaineering.

docs.title: Trump
docs.text:
Their offer for the house was trumped by a higher bid.

The need for blood donors trumps all other concerns.

docs.title: Come across
docs.text: What if we come across the sash but don't see it in the dark?

docs.title: Glistening
docs.text: Powerful waves slammed against the rocks from a point about halfway down, leaving them glistening in the sunshine.

docs.title: Hand me down
docs.text: I got fed up with having to wear my sister's hand-me-downs.

docs.title: Scoop up
docs.text:
I take a deep breath as I fly through the air

Then I scoop up the fox cub and, taking great care

docs.title: That ship has sailed
docs.text: I've thought about going back to college but I feel like that ship has sailed.

docs.title: To ones hearts content
docs.text: They can swing to their heart's content.

docs.title: Wedge
docs.text: But it seemed to be wedged in a crack between two rocks.
